title: Site Options

fields.label: Logo
fields.name: site_logo
fields.instructions: One logo is used everywhere; the footer renders it inverted automatically.

fields.label: Announcement strip text
fields.name: announcement_text
fields.instructions: The single dark line above the header. Leave empty to hide the strip.

fields.label: Header CTA button label
fields.name: nav_cta_label
fields.instructions: Defaults to "Book an Exposure Review" when empty. Links to the hero form.

fields.label: Show intro loader animation
fields.name: show_loader
fields.instructions: The brief branded splash screen on the landing page.

fields.label: Loader tagline
fields.name: loader_tagline
fields.instructions: Small uppercase line under the loader logo.

fields.label: Business phone (dialable)
fields.name: business_phone
fields.instructions: Digits with country code, e.g. +61386186954. Used in tel: links.

fields.label: Coverage line
fields.name: coverage_text
fields.instructions: e.g. "All of Australia". Shown in the contact section and footer.

fields.label: Business address
fields.name: business_address
fields.instructions: Optional — used in schema only if filled.

fields.label: Footer CTA button label
fields.name: footer_cta_label
fields.instructions: Defaults to "Book an Exposure Review" when empty.

fields.label: Copyright line
fields.name: copyright_line
fields.instructions: Leave empty for the automatic "© [year] [site name]" line.

fields.label: Disclaimer line
fields.name: footer_disclaimer
fields.instructions: e.g. "General information only — not legal advice."

fields.label: Schema business type
fields.name: schema_business_type
fields.instructions: Schema.org type for the JSON-LD block, e.g. ProfessionalService.

description: Site-wide content: branding, contact details, footer and schema.
